recent_episodes.title: What Is the Leadership Vacuum? Why 62% of Employees Are Waiting for Direction on AI | AI For Executives
recent_episodes.description:
Send a text

Season 4, Episode 3. The leadership vacuum is real.

Only 25% of employees have heard from their CEO about AI's impact.
Only 13% heard from HR.
62% feel leaders underestimate AI's emotional and psychological impact.

That silence creates what researchers call the leadership vacuum.

And the brain fills vacuums with worst-case scenarios.

In this episode:

Your team trusts ChatGPT more than they trust you.

Research shows workers are turning to AI for help instead of asking colleagues—not because AI is more capable, but because AI doesn't judge them, won't report their struggles, and doesn't compete with them.

Real quote from Reddit:
*"I trust AI more than my colleagues. AI doesn't judge me for not knowing something. And it won't tell my manager I'm struggling."*
